# getascraper/how-to-scrape-mercari-seller

> Mercari Seller Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts seller profile stats and shop listings from Mercari Japan and Mercari US. Free usage credit available for new Apify accounts.

## Overview
- Mercari seller scraper and shop data extraction API
- Extracts: seller rating and review count, follower count, active and sold listings with price and condition
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: $5 of free usage on new Apify accounts

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-mercari-seller/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/mercari-seller-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~mercari-seller-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/mercari-seller-scraper

## How it works
1. Provide one or more Mercari seller IDs or full profile URLs
2. The actor reads the seller's public profile stats and every listing in their shop
3. Results are written as one record per seller, with listings nested inside

## Target site characteristics
- Public seller profile and shop pages on jp.mercari.com and mercari.com
- Shop sizes range from a handful of listings to several hundred per seller
- Covers Mercari Japan and Mercari US marketplaces

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://jp.mercari.com/en/user/profile/{sellerId}
- https://www.mercari.com/u/{sellerId}/

## Pricing
- Free tier: $5 of free usage on new Apify accounts
- Paid: $1.79 per 1,000 seller records

## Output schema (highlights)
- ratingScore: seller's rating score shown on their profile
- numRatings: total reviews received
- followers: follower count
- listings: every active and sold listing with price, condition, and category

## Use cases
- Reseller sourcing a supplier checking a seller's track record before ordering
- Competitive intelligence analyst tracking a rival shop's new drops and prices

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-mercari-seller/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~mercari-seller-scraper/issues
